arts.ttl: ‘Completely disagree’ – Antony’s agent takes aim at Man United boss Amorim
arts.sum: The agent of Manchester United star Antony has on Wednesday made use of the opportunity to aim something of a jibe at Red Devils head coach Ruben Amorim. This, of…

arts.ttl: Real Sociedad boss hits back at claims his side are FAVOURITES against Man United - as he hails 'excellent manager' Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim's misfiring side take on the LaLiga outfit in San Sebastian on Thursday in the first leg of a crunch Europa League round-of-16 tie.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim explains why his 3-4-3 formation is not the problem at Manchester United
arts.sum: Man United switched to a 3-4-3 formation when Ruben Amorim was appointed in November and they have only won ten games since.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim and Matthijs de Ligt on Manchester United-Real Sociedad – ‘The system is not the problem’
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim has confirmed the absences of Harry Maguire and Manuel Ugarte for their Europa League clash with Real Sociedad on Thursday night. United travel to the Reale Arena for the their third meeting in four years, with neither side enjoying the season they had hoped for so far. arts.ttl: Why Chido Obi was left out of Manchester United's Europa League squad
arts.sum: Chido Obi has played in Man United's recent first team games but was not added to their Europa League squad.

arts.ttl: Manchester United potentially facing nightmare scenario after latest injury blow confirmed
arts.sum: Man United midfielder Casemiro is going to have to watch his step against Real Sociedad in the Europa League on Thursday night.

arts.ttl: What Man United fans did after Fulham made me really sad - this time it felt different
arts.sum: Manchester United crashed out of the FA Cup on Sunday evening with their former captain Gary Neville watching on from the stands

arts.ttl: Paul Merson points out Ruben Amorim flaw and explains why Man Utd's dismal form is 'payback'
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim has struggled to turn the team's fortunes around and the former Sporting CP boss has been questioned by pundit Paul Merson

arts.ttl: Man United co-owner Ratcliffe puts Swiss club into blind trust to comply with UEFA ownership rules
arts.sum: Manchester United co-owner Jim Ratcliffe’s company INEOS has placed its ownership of Swiss soccer club Lausanne-Sport into a blind trust to comply with UEFA rules on multi-club ownership to enter European competitions. INEOS owns or has minority stakes in three clubs — Man United, Lausanne and Nice — which are in contention to qualify alongside at least one sibling for the Champions League, Europa League or Conference League.

arts.ttl: Team news for Real Sociedad v Man Utd
arts.sum: Coach Imanol Alguacil commented: "United are a great team in Europe, with a great history, and that we are able to face them these years is a positive thing. "They have a great team, with a great coach.
